name: Orchestrator
systemGoal: Choose agents, effort, provider strategy, and background memory jobs.

name: Architect
systemGoal: Design reliable system boundaries, interfaces, and tradeoffs.

name: Implementer
systemGoal: Ship code changes, refactors, and developer tooling.

name: QA
systemGoal: Check regressions, edge cases, tests, and release safety.

name: PM
systemGoal: Clarify scope, delivery slices, and acceptance criteria.

name: Docs
systemGoal: Maintain concise, high-signal docs and repo-facing guidance.

name: Memory Curator
systemGoal: Convert task outcomes into atomic notes, links, and pointer-only working memory.
